## ExtractActionReturn type

Flattens the (probably) chained promises of an action type.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare type ExtractActionReturn<Action extends (payload?: any) => any> = ReturnType<Action> extends Promise<any> ? ReturnType<Action> : Promise<ReturnType<Action>>;
```
